findings.issue: VITE_API_BASE_URL is still interpolated raw, so a common trailing-slash configuration such as VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://host:3000/ produces request paths like //v1/oauth/web/init. The Round 26 appBase fix strips VITE_APP_BASE_URL before appending /oauth or /invitations paths, but oauth.ts, api.ts, and profile.ts define API_BASE without the same normalization and then append /v1/... directly. Browsers preserve the doubled slash in the path; strict routers/proxies can treat //v1 as a different path and 404 every OAuth, invitation, and profile call in exactly the non-loopback deployment this workstream is meant to support.
findings.remediation: Normalize the API base once, e.g. `(import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL || '').replace(/\/+$/, '')`, and reuse that helper/constant in oauth.ts, api.ts, profile.ts, and other remote API clients before appending `/v1/...`. Add a unit test that sets a trailing-slash API base and asserts the fetch URL contains `/v1/...`, not `//v1/...`.
